calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (18069 Highland Boulevard. Sonoma, Ca 95476)
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard concurrently:
PTR-18-301739 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Non-Exempt Testamentary Trust and
PTR-18-301740 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Exempt Testamentary Trust

Appearances:
Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at 100% between the 2 trusts (case #s above) at total price of $425,000.00, based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (17709 Sunset Way, Sonoma, Ca 95476 (4 Unit Apartment Building))
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-00-273094 Estate of Barbarina Baker
PTR-18-301739 Barbarina Baker GST Non-Exempt Testamentary Trust
PTR-18-301740 Barbarina Baker GST Exempt Testamentary Trust

Appearances: Dennis Vann

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property in the Estate matter is Off Calendar. The Exempt Trust owns 84.9509% of the property. The Non-Exempt Trust owns 15.0491% of the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Additional bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property: 60 Waterman Ave., Sonoma, Ca
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-00-273094 Estate of Barbarina Baker
PTR-18-301739 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Non-Exempt Testamentary Trust
PTR-18-301740 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Exempt Testamentary Trust

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington

The Court noted that the Buyer and the Bond Agent are present. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property in the Estate matter is Off Calendar. The Exempt Trust owns 84.9509% of the property. The Non-Exempt Trust owns 15.0491% of the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $905,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
